CVE-2022-23942.title: Apache Doris, prior to 1.0.0, used a hardcoded key and IV to init ...
CVE-2022-23942.description: Apache Doris, prior to 1.0.0, used a hardcoded key and IV to initialize the cipher used for ldap password, which may lead to information disclosure.
